triggers.name: early_liquidation_trigger
triggers.description: An event that, upon occurring, changes the redemption priority of the Class A notes from sequential by series to pro-rata.
triggers.consequence: Redemption of Class A notes switches from sequential by series (A1 to A6) to pro-rata and pari passu across all Class A series.
triggers.section_reference: (ii) Once the Revolving Period has ended or has been terminated

citation.excerpt: Upon an Early Liquidation of the Fund, the Available Funds will be applied... to the redemption pro rata and pari passu of all Series of Class A Notes
citation.page_or_row: (ii) Once the Revolving Period has ended or has been terminated
